post_content:
✅ Completed Milestones
  • Theme pass + animated pixel environment
  • Community hub (chat, memory wall, account flow)
  • Pixel Studio toolset + import/export
  • Mobile optimization pass across core pages
  • ISO download resolver flow
  • Moderation controls (clear chat/wall, ownership removals)
  • Featured game carousel + game search
  • Richer member profile editor
  • Leaderboard polish (top 3, avatars/initials, dedupe)
  • Score integrity protections (rate checks + suspicious jump guard)
🚧 Category: Community Threading
  • Added lightweight chat reply flow (@name prefill + reply metadata)
  • Added reactions (👍 ❤️ 🔥) with persistent counts
🚧 Category: Scrapbook Curation
  • Added wall tags on upload
  • Added admin feature/unfeature controls
  • Added featured badge support for scrapbook entries
🚧 Category: Game Metadata Cards
  • Added metadata endpoint and admin save form (category/difficulty/controls/description)
  • Added in-page game details card for selected game
🚧 Category: Creator QA Flow
  • Added upload QA checks on publish (viewport, script, mobile input, score hook)
  • Upload status now reports QA check results
🗺️ Next Roadmap
  1. Chat moderation queue (flag + approve/reject workflow)
  2. Scrapbook weekly spotlight automation with archive
  3. Per-game settings panel (spawn rates, difficulty presets)
  4. Public player profile pages + badge system
